title: SK Energy to Start Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) Commercial Production
content: SK Energy, the largest refiner in South Korea and a subsidiary of SK Innovation, announced today the completion of the nationâ€™s first dedicated Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) production line. The new facility, which leverages advanced co-processing technology, is set to commence commercial production next month. This marks a significant milestone in the companyâ€™s ongoing efforts to lead the rapidly expanding SAF market, a burgeoning field within the refining industry.
author: Analysts Account
